programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: As the children call out to Baalveer, Mahabhasm Pari finds out that Ballu is Baalveer. Further, Baalveer fights with the demon and rescues the children.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Meher tells Tauba Tauba that Baalveer will rescue her, he bursts into laughter. Further, Mahabhasm Pari tricks Baalveer into revealing his identity.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Mahabhasm Pari reveals that Ballu is Baalveer, Meher is surprised. Further, Meher calls out to Baalveer as she struggles to quench her thirst.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Mahabhasm Pari successfully tricks Baalveer into taking her to Pari Lok. Further, she urges Baalveer to fulfil her wish without telling Rani Pari.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Taken aback by Meher's disrespectful behaviour, her mother slaps her. Further, Mahabhasm Pari uses Baalveer to get to her destination.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer tells Rani Pari about how Mahabhasm Pari fooled him to gain access to the golden lock. Further, when Mahabhasm Pari prepares to set the demons free, the fairies and Baalveer stop her.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer tells Mahabhasm Pari how she fell right into his trap. Further, Baalveer and fairies fight Mahabhasm Pari in order to rescue Meher.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer gets back on his feet and defeats the ferocious monster. Further, when Rani Pari tries to seal the gates of Danav Lok, Mahabhasm Pari attacks her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members become worried when Goli and Sakharam disappear. They share their concerns about their whereabouts with Inspector Pandey.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On the joyous occasion of Goli and Sakharam's return, Dr Hathi hosts a scrumptious breakfast event for all the members of the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The situation becomes very chaotic as the frustrated plumber loses his temper and threatens to break open Bhide's lock. However, Abdul suggests an alternate idea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bholaram is upset that he had to spend the entire day searching for the keys. Meanwhile his wife Sushma arrives at Gokuldham colony and the colony members try to make it up to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends tell the men of Gokuldham Society about Madhavi's scam. Later, Jethalal and Iyer come up with an intriguing plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide finds that everyone has a secret meeting without him, and Goli gives Bhide a deceptive explanation. Madhavi becomes worried when the Mahila Mandal expresses a desire to see Sonu's gold chain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Bhide to gift Madhavi something special. Meanwhile, Champaklal senses an intriguing secret.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Iyer disguise themselves as a police inspector and sergeant. Jethalal receives praise for his look but Iyer taunts him that the inspector is generally fit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The customers at Gada Electronics believe that Jethalal and Iyer are policemen. Soon, the shoopkeeper decides to give them the evidence.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Chalu Pandey grows suspicious after finding that two police come to take the CCTV footage. Jethalal and Iyer share the CCTV footage with everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham members hatch a plan to trace the scammer through the tattoo design. They decide to seek the help of the artist who created it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The tattoo artist tricks the scammer into getting him to the studio.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Members of Gokuldham take Babban to Madhavi for identification. Later, everyone is shocked when Inspector Pandey arrives at the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Pandey is enraged to find Iyer and Jethalal in police uniform. He proposes to arrest them with scammer but Gokuldham members unanimously apologise.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A serial killer breaks free and chaos ensues everywhere. Soon, the CID team takes up the case and strives to catch the killer.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The iconic characters who were once close friends have now become bitter rivals, now 6 years later their world collide in the most unexpected & dramatic circumstances.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Things go exactly according to Jethalal's plan when the women's association invites Khare for a felicitation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal feels cheated when MK College's trustee Khare doesn't give admission to Tapu even after taking seven lakhs from him. Eventually, he decides to use non-violent methods to teach Khare a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal feels cheated when MK College's trustee Khare doesn't give admission to Tapu even after taking seven lakhs from him. Eventually, he decides to use non-violent methods to teach Khare a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal and Taarak walk to the stage, Khare feels nervous. Later, he is surprised when they do not reveal his deeds in front of everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal feels cheated when MK College's trustee Khare doesn't give admission to Tapu even after taking seven lakhs from him. Later, he decides to use non-violent methods to teach Khare a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundarlal has come to Gokuldham society and this makes Jethalal wonder about what new trouble is he in.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundarlal surprises everyone when he arrives at Gokuldham society. However, Jethalal feels nervous about his visit.

programme.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati
programme.desc: Host Amitabh Bachchan asks a series of questions to several contestants to test their general knowledge and give them a chance to win a cash prize.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With the society's entrance remaining blocked, journalist Rita covers the issue. Daya comes up with an idea to fix the problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya's idea proves to be effective as Iyer's doctor makes his way to the injured patient. While looking for solutions, the residents discover a dangerous truth about the truck.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents heave a sigh of relief as the police successfully inspect the weaponry found in the truck. The truck's owner makes himself known.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The black marketers find themselves in trouble when they see police officers waiting outside the resort. They try to laugh their way out to little avail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are worried as the police threaten to arrest them. The police inspector threatens to hand them a strict punishment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as Inspector Pandey and his team begin to find Popatlal's belongings in the resort. Everyone realises that the sting operation has failed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Pandey confronts Madanlal and accuses him of being a black marketer. Jethalal and Champaklal intervene and plead Madanlal's innocence.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are shocked as Madanlal taunts them about their inability to bring him to justice. He leaves the resort with Inspector Pandey's permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha cannot believe their ears when Inspector Pandey declares the mission a success.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide grows uncomfortable after watching Tapu and his friends dance together. Tapu tries to convince him to join them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak Mehta meets his three biggest fans and takes photos with them. Bhide forbids Tapu Sena from fundraising for Ganesh Utsav in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena have to come clean with the members of Gokuldham Society about how they have failed to organise a Ganesh Utsav celebration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena and the members of Gokuldham Society perform a musical welcome for Lord Ganesha. Everyone is impressed by the work of Tapu Sena.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is furious with Nattu Kaka and wants to fire Baga because his dignity is on the line. Baga takes Bavri on a date.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena plan to punish the members of Gokuldham Society by putting on a talent show in which they have to act like hens.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal makes a deal with Popatlal. The members all celebrate Ganesh Chaturthi, but there is a surprise waiting for them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide's friends are impressed by his singing. Dr Hathi dances his heart out at the celebration and stuns everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita asks Taarak Mehta to recite a poem about Gokuldham Society for his performance. Champaklal mysteriously disappears when it is his turn.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshani calls Baga to perform on the stage. Nattu Kaka tells him to not embarrass Jetha, but Baga's imitation of an actor successfully entertains the crowd.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer is called to say `I love you' to Babita in different languages on stage, but Jetha tries to mess with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jetha and Daya are challenged not to dance when the music plays. Daya struggles to finish the challenge, and Iyer wants Jetha to fail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is worried when Sonu does not return home and asks Champaklal after the kids' whereabouts. They find the kids in a clubhouse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Sonu does not return home, Bhide starts to worry and looks for the kids. He eventually finds them in a clubhouse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the bride's brother finds himself in debt due to everyone uses his money as a donation, he has to ask for Jethalal's help.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide mentions needing help discussing Bapuji, everyone worries something might have happened to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide cannot sleep due to his concerns about Bapuji, but Madhavi tries to calm him by saying that Bagha is with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka leaves Bagha, his nephew, to work for Jethalal at the shop. Later, Bagha is assigned to collect payment from Lachhuram.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal makes several calls in order to sell his paint boxes but all of his attempts fail. Later, he consults Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal worries about not being able to sell the paint boxes, and Daya steps in and sends him a potential client.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal plans to convince everyone to paint Gokuldham Society so he can sell the paint boxes to them, and Taarak decides to help him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide tells Tapu Sena there will be no money left to throw a New Year's party as all the money will be spent on painting the building.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After getting the green light for the New Year's party, Jethalal secretly tells the other men to meet up without their wives knowing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men are caught in the act as they try to throw their own party, and Champaklal teaches them a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide negotiates with Sakharam as they work on the contract for the building's paint job; Daya and Jethalal are glad a deal is made.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The renovation at Gokuldham society finally starts. However, chaos ensues when the society realises they spend all the fund halfway through renovation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sukharam is furious about the paint job contract and ends up ruining the job completely. Later, the residents have to come up with a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone holds Jethalal responsible for the work Sukharam ruins; Champaklal proposes an idea after they fail to find a new contractor.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to fix the paint job gone wrong, and the finished work stuns them; Sukharam apologises to the residents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents agree to do Satyanarayan Puja ritual to celebrate the finished paint job; Nattu Kaka returns to Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal has secretly been planning a secret party in the evening, but everyone seems to have found out somehow, and they all await his party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents realise Champaklal's party is a Bhajan Party to thank God for his blessings and for making the paint job successful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of Gokuldham Society celebrate their mission's success with great enthusiasm. The men gather to toast their accomplishments.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham Society plan a resort trip and decide to enjoy some alcohol to celebrate their success.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is disappointed when he meets Nattu Kaka instead of Babita. Popatlal takes charge of planning a spectacular welcome for the group at the resort.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal's impatience leads him to wake Jethalal from his restful sleep at the resort, frustrating Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak assists Popatlal in placing an advertisement. Popatlal has the opportunity to meet an attractive woman.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal feels happy to meet with Sweety, who might become his wife. Popatlal endeavours to impress her during their encounter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya calls Jethalal when he is at work to inform him about Popatlal, who goes to a hotel for searching a lady and later falls into trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi and his family decide to go for lunch at the new restaurant. However, their family time is interrupted when a tree falls on Dr Hathi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Dr Hathi gets stuck beneath a tree, his brothers and the society members rush to the restaurant and try to help him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While waiting for the fire brigade, Dr Hathi's brothers try to lift the tree.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After everyone tries their best but fails, Babita comes up with a brilliant solution and shares it with the members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Babita's plan to help Dr Hathi fails, Natu Kaka and Bagha bring an axe to chop the tree, but the ladies of a campaign warn everyone not to do such things.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is thankful when a few military men arrive and help Dr Hathi from the tree, but Dr Hathi cannot get up due to his back pain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All members of the society are shocked when the police arrest Popatlal for cutting down the tree after the campaign ladies file the case against him, and Popatlal tries to defend himself.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The people of Gokuldham Society are shocked when the police take Popatlal away for cutting down a tree.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society's members successfully prove Popatlal's innocence. The police arrest the restaurant manager.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer tells his neighbours how Daya has saved Jethalal's reputation with Ratnavali. However, Jethalal confesses to Iyer that he has feelings for another woman.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Sodhi and his friends see a few police cars parked outside a restaurant, they plan to take Sheri's car back to Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and his neighbours successfully steal a police car, but now people cannot get in contact with them. Soon, Babita and the wives start to worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Chalu Pandey believes that a gang of thieves have stolen the police cars. Later, some policemen on a highway stop Sodhi's car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police arrest Sodhi and his friends. Meanwhile, Daya and her neighbours ask Inspector Chalu Pandey to find their husbands.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and her friends find their husbands at the police station. Meanwhile, the police interrogate Sodhi about the crime.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After getting released, Sodhi helps the police identify two car thieves. Jethalal and his friends enjoy their freedom.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balancer her emotional turmoils.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma knocks Kabir out of his senses to stop him from stalking Piya. On regaining his senses, Kabir finds himself in unfamiliar territory.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Everyone is stunned when Karishma brings a baby to the police station. Furthermore, Karishma is determined that they can take care of the child together.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide catches Tappu Sena outside the campus and presumes that they have missed their classes deliberately. After an explanation from Tappu, Bhide is convinced and decides to help them find Pinku.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena are upset after their plan to find Pinku results in failure.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tappu helps Champaklal prepare a sumptuous meal for Jethalal. While they are having dinner, Babita joins them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Society members decide to go to Pinku's place but do not find him as he escapes right before they arrive.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.desc: Some of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcase people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.desc: Bapusaheb becomes wary of Sugandha's well-being after noticing the strange behaviour of her in-laws.

programme.title: ICC Men's T20 World Cup; Cricket Countdown
programme.desc: A countdown of some of the best moments from various professional cricket matches played around the world by various teams.

programme.title: England vs. India 2025 3rd Test; Best of the Tests
programme.desc: Highlights from the third test match between England and India in 2025, where the two professional cricket teams compete against each other for victory.

programme.title: Twenty20 Cricket
programme.desc: England competes against India in their second T20 International match, where the two professional cricket teams vie for victory.

programme.desc: Highlights and analysis of memorable moments and key plays executed by Europe's top football clubs at the UEFA Champions League.

programme.desc: England competes against India in their third One-Day International match in 2022, where the two professional cricket teams vie for victory.
